themes.reasoning_notes: A 6-mana 5/4 with first strike and haste plays as an immediate board-pressure threat in combat-oriented midrange shells.
Unleash can add a +1/+1 counter on entry, giving it minor counters synergy, though it is not a dedicated counters payoff.
Six-mana Rakdos body with haste and first strike is mainly a top-end combat threat; Unleash is optional but not a real counters-theme incentive.
